title: Fast Totem
description: A client-side mod that lets you quickly equip a Totem of Undying to your offhand by Shift+clicking it in your inventory.
body:
Fast Totem is a client-side Minecraft mod for version 1.21.1 (Fabric) that allows you to quickly equip a Totem of Undying to your offhand with a simple Shift+Click in your inventory.
Features

- Quick Equip: Shift+click on a Totem of Undying in your player inventory to instantly move it to your offhand
  
- Smart Detection: Only works when your offhand is empty and you're in the player inventory
  
- Client-Side: Works on multiplayer servers without requiring server-side installation


**Please be aware that this mod may be considered an unfair advantage or cheat on some multiplayer servers. While Fast Totem is a client-side quality-of-life mod, it provides a faster totem equipping method than what vanilla Minecraft offers, which could give players a competitive edge in PvP.**
